com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.keymanager

Class SymmetricKey

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.keymanager.Key
      • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.keymanager.SymmetricKey
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    DUKPTDerivateKey, DUKPTKey

    public class SymmetricKey
extends Key
    Symmetric key.
